name: prd-generator
description: Context engineering PRD generator for AI-driven software development. Ingests existing context (briefings, journey maps, wireframes, screenshots) before interviewing, drives a deep architectural discovery, then dispatches subagents in parallel waves to generate structured artifacts (user stories, E2E test specs, architecture, agent-assignable tasks with parallel execution lanes) — with E2E specs guaranteed at every detail level.
author: hgflima
